title: splash screen loads and app shell renders
description: Open the app root URL and verify the splash screen loads without errors and HelaDry branding or loading state is visible.

title: navigate to login screen
description: From splash or initial route, reach the login page at /login and verify email and password fields and login action are present.

title: login form validation shows errors for empty submit
description: On the login page, attempt submit with empty fields and verify validation or error feedback is shown.

title: create account screen reachable
description: Navigate to /create-account and verify registration form fields (email, password, confirm) are visible.

title: connection mode selection screen
description: After authenticated navigation if required, open connection mode page and verify online vs offline options are shown.

title: dashboard route shows main metrics UI
description: Navigate to /dashboard and verify dashboard layout with metric placeholders or cards is visible.

title: manual controls page loads controls
description: Open /manual-controls and verify temperature or fan related controls and emergency stop affordance exist.

title: start new batch page loads
description: Navigate to /start-new-batch and verify batch or crop selection UI is present.

title: crop guide page loads
description: Open /crop-guide and verify guide content or list of crops is displayed.

title: my records page loads list or empty state
description: Navigate to /my-records and verify records list, filters, or empty state is shown.

title: settings page opens
description: Open /settings and verify settings sections such as theme or profile link are visible.

title: theme or appearance toggle if present
description: From settings, if theme toggle exists, switch theme and verify UI updates (light/dark).

title: pair device flow entry
description: Navigate to /pair-device and verify BLE scan or device list UI is shown or appropriate web limitation message.

title: wifi setup wizard step 1
description: Open /wifi-setup-step1 and verify first step of Wi-Fi provisioning wizard is visible.

title: edit profile page reachable from settings
description: Navigate to /edit-profile directly or via settings and verify profile form fields are present.
